---
title: "Major (later Lieut-C Alexander Learmonth"
---

## Major (later Lieut-C Alexander Learmonth

**Dates:** (1829-1887)

### Description

best man at Jane Colborne\'s wedding

### Biography

His obituary, <i>The Times</i> (11 March 1887), 8.

### Letters

- Letter from October 1, 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
